name: Image Generation
tagline: Local Stable Diffusion / Flux with ComfyUI

capabilityNotes.16: SDXL comfortably; Flux fp8 with offloading

setup.text: Launch ComfyUI, then download a checkpoint model — it is NOT installed by brew (SDXL ~7 GB, Flux ~24 GB).

caveats: Installs ComfyUI only; models are large downloads you fetch yourself. On Apple Silicon, generation is roughly 2–4× slower per image than a comparable NVIDIA GPU.
